title: The People Accept a New Future
description: On pages 8–11, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, King Neptune. The central beat is the people accept a new future.
scene: The scene focuses on the people accept a new future, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, King Neptune shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But if he doesn't make it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're staying right here where we are!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Go for it, big bro straw haat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Fishman Island is in your hands!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You must stop this at once!!!

summary: The People Accept a New Future. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
